text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Sports Equipment Donation Programs 5 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OC LOCKER ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping style sports equipment and uniforms store for youth. Items available are based on donations received. Accepts donations of new or clean used sports equipment and uniforms of all sizes and all sports. Donation pickup is available in the Oregon City area upon arrangement. 716 Taylor Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Youth Pre-K-Grade 12 Hours: Wednesday/Saturday 8:30am-10am. Will open for additional hours when needed and regularly during the weeks leading up to a new season. Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs.
